name: AACarga_ZDerechos_AreaCompras

relations_found.evidence: FROM LUCCA254 U1 Left Join AreaX P1 On P1.Codigo=U1.Area  ...

wl_code:
BuscaQry is Data Source
TableDeleteAll(TABLE_DerechosCompras)
IF HExecuteSQLQuery(BuscaQry, MyConnectionLucca, hQueryWithoutCorrection + hNoBind,
"SELECT U1.Usuario, U1.Area, P1.Descripcion " + ...
" FROM LUCCA254 U1 Left Join AreaX P1 On P1.Codigo=U1.Area  " + ...
"Where U1.Usuario=" + Usuarios.CODIGO + " Order by P1.Descripcion ") = False THEN
Error("HFSQL error: " + HErrorInfo())
END
HReadFirst(BuscaQry)
LOOP (HNbRec(BuscaQry))
TableAddLine(TABLE_DerechosCompras, BuscaQry.Usuario, BuscaQry.Area, BuscaQry.Descripcion)
HReadNext(BuscaQry)
END
